sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n99922" key="sunekqeia/zw" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">συνεκ-θειάζω</orth>, <sense id="n99922.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">join in placing among the gods</tr_>, <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Plu.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">2.492d</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
